name: Stair Tower
short_description: This is a vertical platform game: climb the terrible tower and reach the top to make your wish come true. More than 16 horizontal levels medium-high difficulty Variety of settings
detailed_description:
The legend tells of a tower full of dangers, many tried in the past to climb it, but no one ever succeeded in the task. The goal of the game is to climb a tower, traversing a series of tricky vertical levels filled with obstacles to reach the top.
A retro pixelart style precision horizontal platforming game with a considerable difficulty
-Over 16 Horizontal Levels.
-Variety of settings.
